meaning: n.卷轴,卷形物,名册v.(使)成卷形
examples: There is a handy keyboard shortcut to save you having to scroll up to the top of the screen.
Now, we can scroll through our data offline.
The alternative used here is to keep all the tabs on one row, but provide arrow buttons to scroll along the row.
Eye scroll is expected to be a major feature of the new S IV.
The charity's chief executive Dame Barbara Stocking will receive the scroll at a ceremony in October.
